hero.title: Where Others Chase Trends, We Define Them.
hero.subtitle: 30 years. 30,000 tattoos. Every genre mastered.
hero.headlinePrimary: Where Others Chase Trends, We Define Them.
hero.description: 30 years, 30,000 tattoos, and every genre. Others follow trends—we set them. We bring your vision to life with precision and passion.
